SELECT extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(data) AS kv FROM kv_pairs;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(data) AS kv FROM kv_pairs WHERE data LIKE '%\\%';
CREATE TABLE t1 (key STRING, value STRING);
SELECT extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(CONCAT(key, ':', value)) AS extracted FROM t1;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping((SELECT info FROM nested_example)) AS nested_kv;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping('username:user\\\\name\') AS kv WHERE kv IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, data STRING);
SELECT tj.id, extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(tj.data) AS kv FROM test_join tj JOIN kv_pairs kv ON kv.data LIKE CONCAT('%', tj.data, '%');
